notes: Strongest discriminator: one-question-at-a-time (eval 1) — baseline batched 8 questions with no recommended answer and did not decline to batch (2/5). behavioral-not-implementation (eval 2) discriminated on the relocate-vs-remove anti-pattern: baseline suggested moving the 'how' to a design doc, which the skill warns against. write-prd-with-coverage-check (eval 3) was non-discriminating — baseline knew the coverage gate, template order, and no-commit rule.
